case_title: DANIELLE OLLIE VS. JAIME HUMBERTO RODRIGUEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME HUMBERTO RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED NOV-15-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME HUMBERTO

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OLLIE, DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME HUMBERTO RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF DANIELLE OLLIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAIME HUMBERTO RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES: CESAR RODRIGUEZ AND PEDRO RODRIGUEZ. DEFENDANT RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING, REPRESENTED BY JAMIE HUMBERTO RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUESTS IN COURT FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR HIMSELF AND FOR ONE OF HIS WITNESSES (PEDRO RODRIGUEZ) AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER: MONICA HERNANDEZ (#30154) AND PILAR ESPINOSA (#330288). CASE WAS CONSOLIDATED FOR HEARING WITH CSM-22-866236 (CHARLES MICHAEL OLLIE VS JAIME HUMBERTO RODRIGUEZ ET AL) AS CLAIM IS RELATED TO THE SAME ACCIDENT AND HAS THE SAME DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED NOV-27-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLLIE, DANIELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME HUMBERTO RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,225.00, EXPANDED TEXT (SEE ATTACHMENT MC-025) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-23-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DANIELLE OLLIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JAIME RODRIGUEZ. FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY OLLIE, DANIELLE RODRIGUEZ, JAIME HUMBERTO RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING
